top_signals.title: Kazatomprom sees room for all in nuclear revival
top_signals.summary: Uranium demand from AI, data centres and new reactors is reshaping markets as supply security returns to focus.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: XRP whale wallet withdrawals top 720M as risk-adjusted return data points to opportunity
top_signals.summary: Whales pulled more than 720 million XRP from exchanges, as various data points converge to predict a potential 50% rally.
